# HAL 8

> HAL 8 is the metered AI inference and agent platform built in Abu Dhabi — turn AI agents into routable, owned infrastructure. Powered by Apex Fusion blockchain settlement.

## Company

- **Name**: HAL 8 Ltd
- **Registration**: ADGM 17920
- **Location**: Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE
- **Website**: https://www.hal8.ai/
- **Email**: hello@hal8.io

## What We Do

HAL 8 provides metered AI inference infrastructure that lets enterprises deploy, route, and own AI agent workloads as first-class infrastructure — not as opaque cloud services. Our platform enables:

- **Metered Inference**: Pay-per-token, auditable AI compute
- **Agent Routing**: Intelligent routing across model providers and regions
- **Owned Infrastructure**: Run agents as owned, routable services
- **Knowledge Plane**: Structured knowledge graph, sovereign data, adaptive memory, and continuous feedback via Loop Engine
- **Apex Fusion**: Purpose-built blockchain settlement layer for AI transactions

## Technology

HAL 8 is built on Apex Fusion — a blockchain designed to settle metered AI workloads with verifiability and auditability. This enables enterprises to treat AI inference the same way they treat cloud compute: as owned, metered, auditable infrastructure.

## Contact

For inquiries: hello@hal8.io
